none_required.scope: The runtime Skill is declarative guidance and ships no executable scripts.
none_required.reason: No runtime network, file-write, subprocess, interactive, credential, or account capability is declared.

target_enforcement.openai: No privileged capability is declared by the OpenAI adapter.
target_enforcement.claude: No privileged capability is declared by the Claude adapter.
target_enforcement.generic: No privileged capability is declared by the generic adapter.
target_enforcement.vscode: No privileged capability is declared by the VS Code adapter.
